chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 119 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 06.03.2024 Mr. Sikandar Sadar Siddiqui, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’, Deputy Attorney General along with Shoaib Farhan, Executive Engineer, Pak PWD, Sukkur..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned DAG along with official, present, submit that as the petitioner has already filed relevant certificate(s), his case for appointment on deceased quota would be processed within a short while and considered accordingly. In view of above, this petition is accordingly disposed of. After two months, compliance report shall be submitted. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
